love: Is it okay if I fall for you? Because I don't think I can catch myself.
Are you a magician? Because whenever I look at you, everyone else disappears.
Do you believe in love at first sight, or should I walk by again?
If you were a vegetable, you'd be a 'cute-cumber'.
Are you made of copper and tellurium? Because you're Cu-Te.
longing: I miss you like the sun misses the moon at dawn.
Every love song suddenly makes sense when I think of you.
The distance between us is just a test of how far love can travel.
devotion: I would choose you in every lifetime.
You are my today and all of my tomorrows.
My heart beats your name in every rhythm.
first love: You'll always be my first thought and my last.
Some loves are meant to be remembered forever.
First love is a memory that never fades.
eternal love: Forever is not long enough with you.
I will love you until the stars burn out.
